overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles, featuring long wooden tables filled with diners and ornate stained glass windows at the far end. The camera maintains a steady view from the rear of the hall looking toward the main window, capturing the warm candlelit atmosphere and medieval architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from the rear center aisle, slowly advancing forward

notable_agents.action: server or student walking along the right aisle carrying items

entered.detail: magical floating candles arranged in chandelier formations hanging from the vaulted ceiling
large ornate stained glass window with blue and red patterns at the far end of the hall
long wooden dining table with white tablecloth and dining ware running down the center aisle
long wooden dining table with seated diners on the left side of the hall
long wooden dining table with seated diners on the right side of the hall
tall stone gothic archway with pointed arches along the left wall
tall stone gothic archway with pointed arches along the right wall
stone gargoyle statue mounted on the left wall between archways

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in the warm glow of floating candles. Long wooden tables stretch down the center and sides of the hall, filled with diners engaged in conversation. At the far end, a large stained glass rose window dominates the wall, while stone gothic archways line both sides. A server walks along the right aisle in the foreground, adding life to the atmospheric scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze through a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by the warm, flickering glow of thousands of floating candles. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where long wooden tables filled with conversing diners stretch toward a distant, ornate stained glass rose window. As the camera holds its position, the scene is animated by a server walking along the right aisle in the foreground, adding a sense of lived-in movement to the stillness of the architecture. The view then settles on the interplay between the soft candlelight and the heavy stone gothic archways that line the perimeter of the hall.
